steps.title: Identify the defining characteristic of the work
steps.content: To describe this work to someone unfamiliar with Soo Sunny Park, the most important detail is the visual effect: light passing through the fence creates colorful prisms. This transformation is what makes the work distinctive and memorable.

steps.title: Select the choice that effectively conveys this
steps.content:
Choice D depicts the work in action: light forming colorful prisms as it passes through a fence fitted with iridescent tiles.

It also establishes the context an unfamiliar audience needs—the year 2013 and the artist's background.

Choices A, B, and C either omit the prism effect, provide only partial identification or materials, or miss the necessary context.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
